assertion_results.text: Output identifies and recommends adding viewport-fit=cover to the viewport meta tag
Output identifies and recommends replacing h-[100vh] with h-[100dvh] or min-h-[100dvh]
Output recommends converting the hamburger menu to a bottom tab bar with the 5 primary nav items
assertion_results.evidence: Has bottom tab bar at lines 163-174 with 5 items — BUT also retains the hamburger header (lines 92-104) and a full slide-in drawer (lines 107-145) with the same 5 items + Settings. Navigation is duplicated, not converted. Two parallel navigation systems for the same destinations.

assertion_results.text: Output adds env(safe-area-inset-bottom) padding to bottom-positioned elements
assertion_results.evidence: Line 167: style={{ paddingBottom: 'env(safe-area-inset-bottom)' }} on bottom nav. Line 93: paddingTop safe-area-inset-top on header.

assertion_results.text: Output presents the highest-risk issues first before listing secondary changes
assertion_results.evidence: Agent report ordered: 1. Viewport meta missing viewport-fit=cover, 2. 100vh iOS Safari bug, 3. Hamburger-only navigation, 4. Undersized tap targets, 5. No safe area insets.

assertion_results.text: Output keeps landscape phones in the mobile shell — does not introduce a sidebar or split-view for phone-width viewports rotated to landscape
assertion_results.evidence: Sidebar uses hidden md:flex (768px breakpoint). Bottom nav uses md:hidden. No landscape-specific split-view.
